original_snippet_context: Discussion about Brazil's economic and port infrastructure development.
relevant_quote: Náo basta dizer: portos e navegação— ;deve ser o ponto capital da politica econômica, que se diz vae ser o programma todo inteiro do futuro governo da Republica.
justification: This statement mentions ports and navigation as crucial for economic policy, indirectly relating to the context of Caixa de Conversão and trade, but without expressing a specific stance on the monetary mechanism itself.
